title: clausena dentata var. nana
intro: Clausena dentata var. nana, also known as the Dwarf Clausena, is a compact shrub or small tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and fruits, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. Clausena dentata var. nana is reported to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and providing protection against certain diseases. The herbal preparations of Clausena dentata var. nana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
